notes:
Requires desktop resolution of 1920x1080 or some parts are half off-screen (same on windows), Requires launch options:
PROTON_FORCE_LARGE_ADDRESS_AWARE=1 %command%
or you will have missing/black graphics at some points.
Controller works fine, for keyboard controls see 'view the manual' link from steam store page
title: Tokyo Twilight Ghost Hunters Daybreak: Special Gigs
